about-description: My name is Bălan Eduard I am 26 years old and I consider myself a person who has a great passion when it comes to development of websites, platforms and apps for the vast world of the Internet.

During the last two years I gained experience in web development by studying and practicing of knowledge from platforms specialized in web development (W3&shySchools, Mozilla developers, free&shyCode&shyCamp, Stack&shyOverflow) , but also from tutorials of more advanced developers. I developed some personal projects to serve as proof of my experience.
As a person I consider myself persistent, flexible, receptive, always eager to learn new things and to give my best in every project that I am involved.
Here is a list of technologies that I used: HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, JS, JSON, AJAX, Fetch, API, SASS, BEM, Gulp
